isolation.concurrencyNote: Stayed on Parameter Sweep tab only; did not modify era filter

assertions.title: Parameter Sweep Visualization

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:8050 and click '🧬 Parameter Sweep' tab
steps.expected: Parameter Sweep view with parallel coordinates chart
steps.observed: Parameter Sweep view displayed with heading 'Parameter Sweep', dimension selector dropdown, experiment selector dropdown, and a Plotly chart area

steps.action: Check chart on initial load (no dimensions selected)
steps.expected: Chart should be visible with default dimensions
steps.observed: Chart area shows Plotly toolbar but the parallel coordinates plot is EMPTY — no data rendered. The dimension selector dropdown has initial value of [] (nothing selected). User must manually select dimensions.

steps.action: Open dimension selector and click 'Select All'
steps.expected: All available dimensions selected, chart renders with parallel coordinates
steps.observed: 9 dimensions selected: stability_weight, stability_decay, reinforcement_gain_direct, reinforcement_gain_assoc, stability_cap, lambda_fact, lambda_episode, alpha, floor_max. Chart renders as a parcoords (parallel coordinates) plot on canvas elements.

steps.action: Verify chart type and color scale via Plotly internal data
steps.expected: go.Parcoords with Viridis colorscale mapping to overall_score
steps.observed: Confirmed: type='parcoords', colorscale=Viridis (10 steps from #440154 to #fde725), colorbar title='Overall Score', cmin=0, cmax=1

steps.action: Hover over the parallel coordinates chart
steps.expected: Tooltips showing param values and overall_score
steps.observed: No tooltips appear. Plotly go.Parcoords does not support hovertemplate — this is a known Plotly limitation. The hoverlayer remains empty after hovering at multiple positions. Lines highlight on hover but no text tooltip is displayed.

steps.action: Verify >50% null filtering in 'All' era view (source code verification)
steps.expected: Params with >50% null hidden in 'All' view
steps.observed: Code in get_param_sweep_dimensions() correctly filters: 'if era == All: candidates = [k for k in candidates if param_count[k] / total > 0.50]'. 'All' era has 9 params (vs 16 for LongMemEval and 26 for memories_500).

steps.expected: LME-era ~15 params including assoc_boost, floor_max, sigmoid_k; old-era ~10 params including beta_fact, beta_episode
steps.observed: LongMemEval: 16 params (lambda_fact, lambda_episode, stability_weight, stability_decay, reinforcement_gain_direct, reinforcement_gain_assoc, stability_cap, alpha, floor_max, jost_power, sigmoid_k, sigmoid_mid, activation_weight, retrieval_boost, test_reactivation_start_tick, test_reactivation_interval). memories_500: 26 params (includes lambda_fact, lambda_episode, base_floor, impact_floor_scale, etc.). NOTE: contract says 'beta_fact/beta_episode' for old-era but actual param names are 'lambda_fact/lambda_episode'. Contract says 'assoc_boost' for LME-era but it's not in available params (likely excluded due to low variance or coverage).

evidence: evidence/advanced-analysis/params-sweep/VAL-PARAMS-001-dimension-selector-all-eras.png — Dimension selector dropdown showing 9 available options, all unchecked
evidence/advanced-analysis/params-sweep/VAL-PARAMS-001-param-sweep-all-eras-with-dims.png — Parcoords chart after selecting all 9 dimensions
evidence/advanced-analysis/params-sweep/VAL-PARAMS-001-hover-center.png — Hover attempt at chart center (no tooltip)
evidence/advanced-analysis/params-sweep/VAL-PARAMS-001-hover-alternate.png — Hover attempt at alternate position (no tooltip)
Programmatic verification: get_param_sweep_dimensions returns 9 params for 'All', 16 for 'LongMemEval', 26 for 'memories_500'
Plotly internal data confirms: type='parcoords', colorscale='Viridis', colorbar title='Overall Score'
issues: MAJOR: Chart is empty by default. The dimension selector starts with value=[] (no dimensions selected), so users see an empty Plotly chart area when first navigating to Parameter Sweep. Dimensions should be pre-selected or the chart should show all available dimensions by default.

MODERATE: Hover tooltips not supported for go.Parcoords (Plotly limitation). The contract expects 'Interactive: hover for values' but Plotly's parallel coordinates trace type does not support hovertemplate. Lines highlight on hover but no param values or overall_score text is shown.

MINOR: Contract references 'beta_fact/beta_episode' for old-era and 'assoc_boost' for LME-era, but actual parameter names are 'lambda_fact/lambda_episode' and assoc_boost is not in available LME params. The dimension logic is correct but contract expectations need updating.

assertions.title: Parameter Sweep Interactive Navigation

steps.action: Navigate to Parameter Sweep tab and verify experiment selector dropdown exists
steps.expected: Experiment dropdown/selector for navigation to detail view
steps.observed: Dropdown with id='param-exp-detail-selector' exists with placeholder 'Select experiment to view details...'. Contains 100 experiment options sorted by overall_score descending.

steps.action: Open dropdown and verify experiment options
steps.observed: 100 experiments listed with format 'exp_lme_0102 (overall: 0.6758)' etc., sorted by overall_score descending, top 100 experiments

steps.action: Select exp_lme_0008 from the experiment dropdown
steps.expected: Detail view opens showing exp_lme_0008 experiment data
steps.observed: Dropdown value changes to 'exp_lme_0008 (overall: 0.4630)' but NO detail view opens. The detail-view div remains display:none with 0 children. URL remains 'http://localhost:8050/' without experiment parameter.

steps.action: Select exp_lme_0068 from the experiment dropdown (second attempt)
steps.expected: Detail view opens showing exp_lme_0068 experiment data
steps.observed: Same result: dropdown updates but detail view does not appear. URL unchanged.

steps.action: Verify navigation via leaderboard row click (baseline check)
steps.expected: Clicking leaderboard row should open detail view
steps.observed: Clicking leaderboard row also does NOT open detail view. The toggle_detail_view callback does not fire. This appears to be a broader issue with the detail view mechanism, not specific to the parameter sweep.
No console errors detected. Dash _dash-update-component requests return 200 status.

evidence: evidence/advanced-analysis/params-sweep/VAL-PARAMS-006-exp-selector-result.png — State after selecting experiment from dropdown (detail view not visible)
JavaScript evaluation confirmed: detail-view div has display:none, 0 children after experiment selection
URL remains http://localhost:8050/ after experiment selection (no experiment parameter added)
Network requests show Dash callbacks return 200 but detail view state unchanged
The toggle_detail_view callback appears non-functional — does not fire from any input source (leaderboard click, param sweep selector)
issues: CRITICAL: Selecting an experiment from the parameter sweep dropdown does NOT navigate to the experiment detail view. The on_param_exp_detail_select callback sets selected-experiment store, but the toggle_detail_view callback does not fire or produce visible output. The detail-view div remains hidden (display:none) with no children.

CRITICAL: The detail view mechanism appears completely broken — even clicking rows in the leaderboard table does not open the detail view. The toggle_detail_view callback (prevent_initial_call='initial_duplicate') may have compatibility issues with Dash 4.0.0.
The experiment dropdown itself works correctly (options load, selection registers, value updates visually), but the downstream callback chain to show the detail view is non-functional.

frictions.description: Dash Radix-based dropdown components are difficult to interact with via agent-browser. Standard 'click option' and 'select value' commands don't work. Had to use JavaScript evaluation to find and click options by iterating through [role='option'] elements.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval to open dropdown, find options via querySelectorAll, and click the target option by index.

frictions.description: Could not test era-specific dimension views (LongMemEval vs memories_500) interactively due to concurrency constraints — changing era filter would affect other validators sharing the dashboard.
frictions.resolution: Verified era-specific dimensions programmatically via Python script calling get_param_sweep_dimensions() directly.

summary: VAL-PARAMS-001: PARTIAL — Parallel coordinates plot renders correctly when dimensions are manually selected. Color scale (Viridis → overall_score) works. Parameter selector (multi-select dropdown with checkboxes) allows toggling dimensions. Code correctly filters >50% null params in 'All' view. However: (1) chart is empty by default (no dimensions pre-selected), (2) hover tooltips not supported by go.Parcoords (Plotly limitation). VAL-PARAMS-006: FAIL — Experiment detail selector dropdown exists and selections register visually, but the detail view does not open. The toggle_detail_view callback chain appears broken in Dash 4.0.0 — detail view is non-functional even from the leaderboard.
